- Terry Furlow (1979-80)
- Jim Farmer (1988-89)
- Greg Foster (1995-99)
- Todd Fuller (1998-99)
- Kyrylo Fesenko (2007-11)
- Derek Fisher (2006-2007)
- Derrick Favors (2011-present)
